description: XPBD to Warp XPBD compliance mapping for Forma fabric library
notes: Compliance = 1 / stiffness. Warp XPBDIntegrator uses compliance in m²/N. Values derived from fabric_library.json XPBD parameters.

cotton_jersey_default.notes: Standard weight cotton jersey knit. Stretch compliance = 1/40, bend compliance = 1/0.005

cotton_jersey_heavy.notes: Heavy cotton jersey for sweatshirts. Increased stiffness vs. default. Stretch compliance = 1/55, bend compliance = 1/0.015

polyester_woven.notes: Lightweight polyester plain weave for dress shirts. Higher stiffness than jersey. Stretch compliance = 1/80, bend compliance = 1/0.008

denim_12oz.notes: Medium weight denim for jeans. Highest stiffness due to dense weave. Stretch compliance = 1/120, bend compliance = 1/0.08

silk_charmeuse.notes: Lightweight silk charmeuse with minimal bending resistance. Lowest stretch stiffness and extremely low bend stiffness. Stretch compliance = 1/25, bend compliance = 1/0.001
